overview: Real Multiplayer Racer is a top-down 2D arcade racing game. Race on neon-lit roads, dodge traffic, collect coins and power-ups, and climb the leaderboard — single-player first, with multiplayer coming soon.
features: 10-screen full game flow: Splash, Menu, Car Selection, Game Mode, Upgrades, Gameplay, Crash, Results, Leaderboard, Challenges
7 car types with unique stats and 4 color options each
3 map themes: Highway, City, and Canyon
Score Mode (endless) and Timed Mode (1/3/5/10 min)
Tap/swipe lane controls, dodge traffic, collect coins and fuel
Dark neon visual style with rainbow glow trails and animated HUD
